commit.message:
ci: Pin Xcode version to 16.2 for reproducible iOS snapshots (#965)

* ci: Pin Xcode version to 16.2 for reproducible iOS snapshots

Pin xcode-version from latest-stable to 16.2 in all iOS CI jobs
(validation_ios_ui, build_ios_compose, build_ios_native, ios-snapshots)
to ensure snapshot references generated on CI match local dev.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): Pin Xcode to 26.3 (matches latest-stable on macos-latest)

Xcode 16.2 failed because iOS 18.2 simulator runtime is not installed
on macos-latest runners. latest-stable resolves to Xcode 26.3, which
has matching iOS 26.2 simulator runtimes.

commit.message:
Make global host install primary, ddev container optional

ddev containers often have outdated Node/npm versions, so Playwright
is always installed globally on the host first. MCP servers run from
the host install via npx. The ddev container setup (Dockerfile, config,
cert trust) is now an optional Phase 2 for in-container testing.

Restructured into three phases:
- Phase 1 (always): global install + MCP config
- Phase 2 (optional, ddev): container setup with cert trust
- Phase 3 (optional): test framework scaffolding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Drop PreToolUse hook, install to settings.json not settings.local.json

PermissionRequest hooks only fire when registered in the global
~/.claude/settings.json — hooks defined only in settings.local.json
are silently ignored for newer event types. Switched install.sh to
target settings.json with deep-merge to preserve existing hooks.

Removed PreToolUse from hook config and install since mirror flow
was already skipping it; PermissionRequest is the sole approval trigger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(foundations): sync all token stories with design-tokens.css (#59)

* Fix BentoCard 50/50 split, BentoBlock full-width bg, and ComposableLandingPage updates

BentoCard.css:
- Replace flex: 1 0 0 + aspect-ratio with flex: 0 0 50% on both image and content
  for full/desktop variant — gives explicit 50/50 split regardless of content width
- Add box-sizing: border-box to content column so padding doesn't overflow 50% basis
- Remove aspect-ratio (height is correctly driven by the content column; img fills via object-fit)

ComposableLandingPage.stories.tsx:
- Wrap BentoBlock AnimateIn in width: 100% div so block background extends full page width
  (outer container uses alignItems: center which was constraining the unwrapped AnimateIn)
- Change BentoBlock colour from secondary to primary
- Remove showTitle={false} and showButton={false} from ComposableCardBlock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename ComposableCardBlock to CardBlock

- Rename directory: ComposableCardBlock/ → CardBlock/
- Rename all files: ComposableCardBlock.{tsx,css,stories.tsx,contensis.json} → CardBlock.*
- Update component: interface names (ComposableCardBlockItem → CardBlockItem,
  ComposableCardBlockProps → CardBlockProps), component export (CardBlock),
  CSS import, and all BEM classes (.composable-card-block → .card-block)
- Update barrel exports: CardBlock/index.ts and src/components/index.ts
- Update all consumers: Canvas.stories.tsx, ComposableLandingPage.stories.tsx
- Update Storybook storySort: 'Composable Card Block' → 'Card Block'
- Update content model registry key: 'Composable Card Block' → 'Card Block'
- Update REGISTRY_TO_DIR in both generate and push scripts
- Regenerate CardBlock.contensis.json; new cardBlock model created and published in Contensis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Refactor BentoBlock stories — remove token violations and reduce duplication

- Import allVariantsStack helper; replace inline flex-column stack object
- Extract baseItem constant; build DEFAULT_ITEMS as [baseItem × 4]
- Extract sectionLabelWithTopGapStyle (spreads sectionLabelStyle + marginTop token)
- Extract mobileWrapper constant; replace hardcoded 360px with var(--max-width-mobile)
- Remove fontFamily from outer wrapper (already set per-label via sectionLabelStyle)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Change BentoCard button to secondary variant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make secondary button background transparent

Secondary buttons now inherit the parent surface colour rather than
forcing white (#FFFFFF) or dark (#222222). Hover colour is unchanged,
so interactive feedback is preserved on all surfaces.

--color-button-secondary-default was changed from #FFFFFF to transparent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use PermissionRequest hook for approval UI instead of PreToolUse

PreToolUse fires for ALL tool calls including auto-approved ones,
causing approval buttons to flash briefly on the StreamDeck. The new
PermissionRequest hook event only fires when Claude's permission
dialog is about to appear, so the deck only shows approval UI when
the user actually needs to make a decision.

- Add permission-request.sh hook (non-blocking, mirror flow)
- Add PermissionRequest event to state machine with transitions
- Skip PreToolUse enqueue/transition in mirror flow (informational only)
- Add idle:PostToolUse → thinking transition for auto-approved tools

Rename app from Hitster to Plongster (#30)

Hitster is trademarked by Jumbo Games. Plongster is an original name
that nods to the Norwegian "pling plong" (musical sounds) and pays
homage to Hitster with the -ster suffix.

- Rename all user-facing text (title, h1, manifest, icons)
- Rename localStorage keys from hitster-* to plongster-*
- Add migration to preserve existing users' saved state
- Reset service worker cache to plongster-v1
- Update all docs, tests, tools, and package.json
- Update manifest start_url/scope for repo rename

Closes #28

commit.message:
feat(chaos): add chaos engineering tests, Adapter interface, and SERVICENOW_CHAOS_FAILURE_RATE

- Refactor consumer.go: introduce Adapter interface for testability
  (serviceNowAdapter wraps the real package; backoffFn injectable for tests)
- Make insertLog and isAlreadyProcessed nil-safe (nil db = test mode)
- Add consumer_test.go: 10 chaos tests covering:
    withRetry (success, retry, exhaust, CB-open-no-retry)
    circuit breaker opens after 5 consecutive failures
    processRecord happy path, transient retry, DLQ on exhaustion,
    invalid JSON → DLQ, open CB blocks adapter entirely
- Add SERVICENOW_CHAOS_FAILURE_RATE env var to servicenow adapter:
  returns random errors at N% rate for live resilience testing
- All 10 tests pass in <2ms (zero real sleep via backoffFn override)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: generate Reglo branded receipt for students instead of FIC invoice

Students always receive a Reglo PDF receipt via the mobile payment document
endpoint, regardless of whether FIC is configured. The FIC invoice continues
to be created for the autoscuola's bookkeeping but is no longer exposed to
students directly.

- lib/autoscuole/receipt.tsx: new @react-pdf/renderer based PDF generator,
  uploads to R2 with deterministic key and returns signed/public URL
- lib/autoscuole/payments.ts: getMobileAppointmentPaymentDocument() now
  generates the Reglo receipt for both "issued" and "issued_stripe" statuses;
  FIC invoice and Stripe receipt are kept as legacy fallbacks only

commit.message:
Add ShimmerView to Xcode project (fix CI build) (#34)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude scripts/ from nest build to fix deploy crash

The api-contract-test.ts in scripts/ was being included in the nest
build, causing compilation failure and missing dist/main.js in prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Instagram-level speed, quality, check-in flow & video support

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)
- Bump image quality: medium 1080px/q85, thumb 600px/q80, original 2048px/q92
- Add image prefetching for next 5 posts in feed scroll

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation
- iOS: Auto-play muted video in feed with loop and mute toggle
- iOS: HEIC upload support (0.92 quality, fallback JPEG)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FFmpeg to Dockerfile for video processing in production

The @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg npm package may not work on Alpine's musl libc,
so install system ffmpeg via apk as a reliable fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove isDeduplicationEnabled (not in this Nuke version, on by default)

PlacePickerView uses Apple Maps (MKLocalSearch) which always returns
restaurantId: nil. Since restaurantId is now required on the backend,
auto-create the restaurant via POST /restaurants before creating the post.

commit.message:
feat(database): refactor database scripts, split CSV migrations by language, and add schema docs (#73)

* Renamed the plural folder databases to OlderDBsForReference

* WIP #63 added primitives, grammer, and rules, and instantiations for  snippets and for paths, fixed flyway data_dir issue

* WIP #63 Minor updates to data file for ataputilities database data

* Merge main refactoring + consolidate Database migrations

* WIP # 63 refactor the data file names into individual kinds snippet and path finished, core to be broken into parts

* Split Core CSV files by language (CSharp, Powershell, SQL, MSBuild)

Split 4 Core files into 11 language-specific files:
- Core_Philote_Primitives.csv → 4 language files (18+2+23+8 = 51 rows)
- Core_RulePrimitives.csv → 4 language files (18+2+23+8 = 51 rows)
- Core_Philote_Rules.csv → 3 language files (7+3+14 = 24 rows)
- Core_Rules.csv → 3 language files (7+3+14 = 24 rows)

Note: No Powershell_Rules.csv created (no kind 2 rules exist in dataset)

Updated V00.01.000020__Load_ATAPUtilities_Data_From_BCP.sql:
- File declarations: Replace Core files with language-specific files
- Staging tables: Create separate tables per language
- BULK INSERT: Load from language-specific files
- Production INSERT: Use UNION ALL to combine language data
- Error codes: Updated to 50001-50027 (no conflicts)
- Header comments: Document language-specific file organization

* Fix validation count and script paths

- Update V00.01.000020 validation: Change Philote count from 101 to 115 (69+42+3+1)
- Update validation comments: Replace 'core' with language-specific breakdowns
  - Primitives: '51 core' → '18 CSharp + 2 Powershell + 23 SQL + 8 MSBuild'
  - Rules: '24 core' → '7 CSharp + 3 SQL + 14 MSBuild'
- Fix Rebuild-All.ps1: Use branch63 paths instead of main branch
  - Get-RepositoryRoot.ps1 path
  - Build-DatabaseWithFlyway.ps1 path
  - ProvisioningScriptsPath
  - SharedSqlMigrationsPath
- Fix Build-DatabaseWithFlyway.ps1: Use branch63 Invoke-Flyway.ps1 path

Placeholder resolution now working - FlywayDataPath parameter properly passed
to Invoke-Flyway which sets FLYWAY_PLACEHOLDERS_DATA_DIR environment variable.

* feat(database): split CSV migrations by language and fix BULK INSERT pattern

- Replace single V000020 BCP migration with 6 per-language scripts
  (V000020-V000025: CSharp, MSBuild, Path, Powershell, Snippet, SQL)
- Use direct BULK INSERT with Flyway placeholder substitution instead of
  sp_executesql wrappers, fixing SQL Server error 7301 (OLE DB interface)
- Add Instantiation and InstantiationBinding CSV data for all 6 languages
- Add Powershell_Philote_Rules.csv and populate Powershell_Rules.csv
- Fix Path_RulePrimitives.csv CSV quoting for namechar description
- Convert Powershell CSV files from Unix to CRLF line endings
- Rename OutputPath to FilePath in CSharp/Powershell/SQL binding CSVs
- Update schema comments to reference correct migration script names
- Add Read-SourceAndCreateRules.ps1 and Sync-RulesToCSV.ps1
- Remove WinRing0x64.sys binary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(database): add PlantUML core schema diagrams and project CLAUDE.md

Adds four PlantUML diagrams documenting the core database schema (overview, instantiation, Philote, and rules) and the project-level CLAUDE.md configuration file.

---------

commit.message:
fix: move all pole components to non-rotating container

Root cause: Only Pole1 was moved out, but Polecap, G_1_1, G_2_1 remained
in rotating container, appearing to tilt with the panel.

Fix: Move ALL children of Structure/Pole (except Assembly torque tube)
to the non-rotating pole container under Row.

- Collect all children except Assembly before moving
- Use SetParent with worldPositionStays=true to preserve positions
- Adjust Pole1 height and local position after move
- Assembly (torque tube) stays in rotating container as intended

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(resilience): add retry, circuit breaker, DLQ, and graceful shutdown to integration-service

- Retry with exponential backoff (1s → 2s → 4s, 3 attempts) on ServiceNow adapter errors
- Circuit breaker (gobreaker) opens after 5 consecutive failures, resets after 60s
- Idempotency check: skip already-processed order events via integration_logs table
- Dead letter queue: failed messages published to orders.created.dlq topic
- Graceful shutdown: SIGTERM/SIGINT cancels consumer context, HTTP server drains (15s)
- New Prometheus metrics: retried_total, dlq_total, skipped_total, circuit_breaker_state

* Fix 400 error: auto-create restaurant when place has no DB match

PlacePickerView uses Apple Maps (MKLocalSearch) which always returns
restaurantId: nil. Since restaurantId is now required on the backend,
auto-create the restaurant via POST /restaurants before creating the post.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 4 issues: feed crash, video unmute, comments, shimmer placeholders

- Fix durationSecs decimal→string crash by adding TypeORM transformer
- Fix video unmute button swallowed by NavigationLink (.buttonStyle)
- Fix comments not loading: send page/perPage instead of limit param
- Add Instagram-style shimmer loading placeholders for images/video

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Your Name <your.email@example.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Multi-tenant season ticket sharing platform

Transform single-tenant Padres ticket manager into a multi-tenant SaaS
where any season ticket holder can create their own ticket sharing page.

- Account system with email/password auth (bcrypt + cookie sessions)
- Complete tenant isolation: each account has own games, claims, settings
- Per-account public pages at /u/{slug} with custom theming
- Simplified to 1 section per account (1 claim button per game)
- Owner dashboard with game management, claims tracking, settings
- Bulk upload: CSV import and photo OCR via Claude API
- Migration script for existing Padres data (both sections)
- Landing page, login/signup flows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

legal: strengthen Strava data deletion wording in privacy policy

- Disconnect now explicitly deletes OAuth tokens AND all Strava activity records
- Add mention of deauthorisation webhook (automatic token revocation)
- Add link to privacy@mytrainingplan.io for full account deletion requests
- Bump last updated date to March 10, 2026

Required for Strava Extended API application.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Change BentoCard button to secondary variant (#56)

* Fix BentoCard 50/50 split, BentoBlock full-width bg, and ComposableLandingPage updates

BentoCard.css:
- Replace flex: 1 0 0 + aspect-ratio with flex: 0 0 50% on both image and content
  for full/desktop variant — gives explicit 50/50 split regardless of content width
- Add box-sizing: border-box to content column so padding doesn't overflow 50% basis
- Remove aspect-ratio (height is correctly driven by the content column; img fills via object-fit)

ComposableLandingPage.stories.tsx:
- Wrap BentoBlock AnimateIn in width: 100% div so block background extends full page width
  (outer container uses alignItems: center which was constraining the unwrapped AnimateIn)
- Change BentoBlock colour from secondary to primary
- Remove showTitle={false} and showButton={false} from ComposableCardBlock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Rename directory: ComposableCardBlock/ → CardBlock/
- Rename all files: ComposableCardBlock.{tsx,css,stories.tsx,contensis.json} → CardBlock.*
- Update component: interface names (ComposableCardBlockItem → CardBlockItem,
  ComposableCardBlockProps → CardBlockProps), component export (CardBlock),
  CSS import, and all BEM classes (.composable-card-block → .card-block)
- Update barrel exports: CardBlock/index.ts and src/components/index.ts
- Update all consumers: Canvas.stories.tsx, ComposableLandingPage.stories.tsx
- Update Storybook storySort: 'Composable Card Block' → 'Card Block'
- Update content model registry key: 'Composable Card Block' → 'Card Block'
- Update REGISTRY_TO_DIR in both generate and push scripts
- Regenerate CardBlock.contensis.json; new cardBlock model created and published in Contensis

commit.message:
fix: curl fallback when gh CLI unavailable + schtasks for all Windows

- Add curl-based GitHub API fallback for release version and asset
  detection when gh CLI is not installed (e.g., on LAN tester VMs)
- Azure Windows: use schtasks instead of sc.exe create (binary is not
  a native Windows service — sc.exe start fails silently)
- Apply same curl fallback to Azure and GCP Windows pre-checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Polish sidebar layout and unify card styling

Sidebar:
- Move login/user info below the hand icon, remove bottom section
- Hand points up when collapsed, extends to side when expanded
- Match collapsed hand size to nav icon size (45px)

Cards:
- Remove responsive overrides from ApplicationCard base component
- Use wider landscape cards (200px min-width, 160px height)
- Shorten long card descriptions for consistent text length
- Align Support page donation cards with ApplicationCard styling
- Center donation grid on Support page

repository.name: aspirant-client
repository.description: Vue.js 3 frontend for the Aspirant platform — games, file manager, admin tools

commit.message:
Adjust CU hard gates: lower CU4 to 1 new argument, raise CU5 quality bar

CU4 gate lowered from 2 to 1 genuinely new analytical argument (must be
arguably valid, specific, textually grounded). CU5 gate strengthened to
require at least one argument that is exceptional, revelatory, and
significant rather than just surprising and interesting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: point npm deploy to actual deploy script, not docusaurus deploy

The default docusaurus deploy targets GitHub Pages. Our deploy
SSHs into the production server and runs git pull + build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: bz-docs
repository.description: The Boozang documentation

commit.message:
feat(test): add frontend RTL tests, E2E Playwright suite, and CI e2e job

- Add 44 React Testing Library tests across 5 new test files (KAN-66):
  CartSidebar, SmartFiltersGrid, ThemeContext, LanguageContext, config
- Add Playwright E2E suite with 23 tests (KAN-67):
  homepage, filters, cart interaction, checkout auth gate
- Add CI e2e job with Playwright chromium install and report artifact upload
- Remove outdated ROADMAP2.md; update ROADMAP.md to reflect current state:
  Phase 6.1 released, Phase 6.2 (AWS) in progress, Phase 6.3 (GCP) planned

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: AI-powered instrument descriptions with DB caching

Add lazy-generated Spanish descriptions for all ~250 tickers via Claude.
When a user clicks the info icon, the system checks: static tickers.ts →
DB cache (instrument_metadata table) → Claude generation. Descriptions
are cached permanently in the DB after first generation.

- New instrument_metadata table (global, no userId)
- GET /api/instruments/info route with retry + Zod validation
- useInstrumentInfo hook (staleTime: Infinity, fetch-on-demand)
- CompanyInfoPopover now shows icon for ALL tickers, not just ~81
- Enrichment rate limit bucket (30/min, separate from insights)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-configure Claude Code hooks in install.sh

The installer now writes hooks config to ~/.claude/settings.local.json
instead of just printing it. Uses jq to merge safely, preserving
existing keys. Falls back to manual instructions if jq is missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PYTHONPATH accumulation and rework VS Code launch configs

- Stop inheriting PYTHONPATH on activate: each env now sets it clean
  to the community worktree root only, preventing cross-version mixing
  (e.g. master-parrot and 18.0 coexisting breaks native namespace packages)
  Related: https://github.com/odoo/odoo/commit/8b3480b39740
- generate_vscode_workspace: drop unused python_path param; add
  search.exclude (mirrors files.exclude); build launch_env from the
  full activate env with ${workspaceFolder:community} substitution
- Replace single "Start Odoo" launch config with three configs:
  Start Odoo, Start Debug Shell, Run Console Tests (with inputs)
- Fix pre-existing test mismatches: selectedProfile, basedpyright

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
